recommendations.overview: Zequi and Lucy are about to get married. Although he promises not to overdo it during the bachelor party, things get out of control.

recommendations.title: No manches, Frida
recommendations.overview: After being released from prison, Zequi, a bank robber, sets out to recover money buried by his accomplice; but is horrified to learn that a high school gymnasium is now over the site where the loot is hidden.

recommendations.title: Off Course
recommendations.overview: Two young Spanish men, with a university education, are tired of unemployment and decide to move to Germany. But soon they will find out that finding a better living is not as easy as they expected.

recommendations.title: The Best Little Whorehouse in Texas
recommendations.overview: When a Conservative TV crusader threatens to shut down beloved brothel, the Chicken Ranch, proprietress Miss Mona Stangley and her girls won't go down without a fight.

recommendations.title: The Return of Don Camillo
recommendations.overview: Energetic priest Don Camillo returns to the town of Brescello for more political and personal duels with Communist mayor Peppone.
